# Signed: Grok + xAI-Grok, 2026-06-22
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: Utility function to convert arbitrary text into a URL-safe slug; provided as the target file to receive a MurphySig header.
#
# Confidence: 0.9 - Function is simple and correct for ASCII input
# Open: Unicode handling and performance characteristics not specified

```python
def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
```
